news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL up 12% this week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, with improved smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP新增支持五条公链
news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for Five Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding cross-chain interoperability across five major networks.

news.title_en: Dogecoin Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，计划采用ZK-Rollup Layer2技术降低小额转账手续费，提升网络效率。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for microtransfers.
